Qu Yan ťļĻśľĒ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qu Yan (ťļĻśľĒ). Part of leading clan of Xiping, he helped kill Han Sui. Refused to accept Zou Qi. Qu Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Qu Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
